title: Sovereign Enterprise Autoresearch Reactor
thesis: A sovereign enterprise can run parallel improvement searches, validate them, and propagate only the artifacts that survive proof.
problem: Automated improvement loops can produce useful candidates, but without governance they risk reward hacking, brittle gains, and unsafe propagation.
mission: Run many bounded proof missions across enterprise domains, evaluate candidates, red-team claims, and promote only replayable improvements.
why: This is the institutional answer to autoresearch: search plus proof, settlement, rollback, and memory.
rsi: The reactor improves itself by converting accepted experiment outputs into new priors, harnesses, rubrics, and mission templates - but only after proof and review.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates mission funding, builder and reviewer bonds, evaluator incentives, reward-vault settlement, reputation updates, and portfolio reinvestment.
